from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad

Àpèjúwe: - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123' - get_url_for_query'(https://example.com/api/user', '') returns None Args: api_url: The API URL to query user info._id: The user ID to query. Returns: str."""
